title: AlphaFold model with confidence colouring
prompt: Load the AlphaFold model of human tumour suppressor p53 (UniProt P04637) as a cartoon, coloured by the model's per-residue confidence.
notes: Tests the AlphaFold path: alphafold_view loads the predicted model addressed by UniProt accession and applies pLDDT confidence colouring automatically.
